g.text: System design questions are open-ended and its easy to be get lost.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: When I gave my first interview, I discussed requirement for almost an hour.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: (which is how you typically take when you take a completely different task at work.)

g.text: Second time, I gave -- asked to design dropbox - followed no standard process. just casual discussion.

g.text: Third Time, I gave , I focus on optimisation of one part -- making it strong case for problem solving but poor for system design.

g.text: * You have 15 mins to conquer a part, do it in that time and as much as you can and than move to next.. No matter what !! even If you have further ideas for optimization..
